---
name: Feature Pull Request
about: Use this template for pull requests that add new capabilities or features to Myna.
title: '[Feature] Short descriptive title here'
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
<!-- Briefly describe the feature being added and why it is needed. -->


## Related Issues/Pull Requests
<!-- Link any related issues or pull requests here. Use `Closes` to automatically close issues when this PR is merged. Use `Related to` to link without closing. Use `Depends on` to indicate dependencies. -->

> [!NOTE]
> All feature PRs should link to at least one issue describing the feature being added.

- Closes: #
- Related to: #
- Depends on: #

## Summary of Changes
<!-- List the main changes made in this pull request. -->


## Testing 
<!-- Describe how the feature was tested, including any new tests added. -->


## Documentation 
<!-- Describe any documentation updates made to support this feature. -->


## Reviewer Focus Areas
<!-- List any specific areas of the code that reviewers should focus on when reviewing this pull request. -->


## Checklist
<!-- Please review the checklist and ensure all items are addressed before submitting the pull request. Mark [X] for completed items. -->

- [ ] Linked issues/PRs are set (Closes/Related to/Depends on)
- [ ] Tests added/updated or rationale provided
- [ ] Documentation updated or marked not needed
- [ ] Reviewer focus areas provided
